$comment: compose: build a multi-file system from a directory of .spec files in <ws>/specs. read all specs -> model PLANS the build order + contracts -> extract an ordered worklist -> foreach generates each unit in order (each sees the project so far via read_project, so contracts accumulate) -> build the whole project. Run with --ws <project>; specs live in <ws>/specs. proj = $workspace.
summary: Compose a system from a dir of specs: plan the build order, generate each unit in dependency order against the accumulated project, then build the whole thing.
